title: chamaecrista molinae
intro: Chamaecrista molinae, also known as Partridge pea, is a flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chamaecrista molinae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in capsule or tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
